title: About Bed Bugs
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Bed bug bites can cause itching, loss of sleep, and rarely allergic reactions.
Bed bugs are not known to spread disease.
Bite treatment focuses on itch control and avoiding scratching to prevent secondary infection.
People should address the infestation source to prevent ongoing bites.
